🏀 Men, it’s time to settle it on the sticks.

After the Detroit Metro Men’s Conference, jump into our NBA 2K/MADDEN Tournament and see who really has game.

🔥 Worship & Word
🍔 Smash Burgers
🎮 NBA 2K & MADDEN
👊 Brotherhood

June 26 • 7 PM
First Church Sterling Heights

Who’s winning the tournament? 👀

🔥 DETROIT METRO MEN’S CONFERENCE 🔥

📅 Friday, June 26
🕖 7:00 PM (Pre-Service Prayer at 6:30 PM)
📍 First Church Sterling Heights

This is more than a service—it’s a weekend built for men!

🏀 2K Tournament
🥒 Pickleball
🍔 Smash Burger Food Truck
🎤 Q&A Sessions
🎁 Incredible Giveaways
🙌 Powerful Worship & Ministry

Join men from across the Detroit Metro District for a night of fellowship, fun, challenge, and spiritual renewal. Bring a friend and don’t miss what God is going to do!

#DetroitMetroMensConference #FirstChurchSH #MensMinistry #Brotherhood #FaithAndFellowship

🔥 MEN OF DETROIT — IT’S TIME! 🔥

📍 First Church Sterling Heights
📅 June 26–27
🕡 Pre-Service Prayer: 6:30 PM
🕖 Friday Night Service: 7:00 PM
🍳 Saturday Men’s Breakfast Panel: 10:00 AM (Catered by Johnny Cakes)

PLUS:
🌮 Food Truck
🎁 Giveaways
🏈 Concrete University of Michigan Table
🔥 Infinity Table

Join us for the Detroit Metro Men’s Conference featuring ministry from Pastor Aaron Soto and worship led by Draylin Young.

Come expecting powerful worship, great fellowship, practical encouragement, and a life-changing move of God.

Bring a friend, your sons, or your entire men’s group and be part of an unforgettable weekend!

#DetroitMetroMensConference #FCSterlingHeights #MensMinistry #Brotherhood #Revival

🔥 DETROIT METRO MEN’S CONFERENCE 2026 🔥

In a world that constantly weakens men, confuses identity, and isolates brotherhood—we believe God is raising up strong, Spirit-filled men in Detroit metro.

Men's Conference 2026 is a weekend of strengthening, sharpening, and connecting with men from across our district.

Join us for two powerful days filled with worship, preaching, brotherhood, honest conversation, and moments that will challenge and encourage you in your walk with God.

Invite a friend and make plans now to join us!
REGISTER: https://subspla.sh/n7t52y4

We’re honored to welcome:
🎙 Aaron Soto
🎸 Draylin Young
👦 Children’s Evangelist Silas VanOoteghem

📅 Friday, June 26 | 7 PM
• Service with Aaron Soto
• Children’s Service for boys ages 5–12
• Food trucks & activities after service

📅 Saturday, June 27 | 10 AM
• Men’s breakfast
• Devotional with Aaron Soto
• Live panel & roundtable discussion

📍 First Church Sterling Heights
39400 Dequindre Rd
Sterling Heights, MI 48310

#DetroitMetroMen #mensconference2026

🚨 TONIGHT’S THE NIGHT 🚨

Men from across the Detroit Metro District are gathering around the table tonight for an important conversation about building strong, God-centered homes.

🏡 FAITH AT HOME
with special guest Kyle Turner

How do we lead spiritually at home?
How do we raise children that truly love God?
How do we model faith in everyday life?

Tonight’s conversation is going to be practical, honest, encouraging, and challenging.

🗓 TONIGHT
⏰ 7:30 PM
💻 Zoom: https://subspla.sh/t7vnr4h

Men—you belong at the table.
Invite a friend. Bring another man with you. Let’s grow together.

Valuable conversation.
Deeper conviction.
Strengthened community.

#MensRoundtable #FaithAtHome #DetroitMetroMen #BiblicalFatherhood

A strong church starts with strong homes.

This month at the MEN’S ROUNDTABLE, we’re having a real conversation about leading our families spiritually and raising children in truth.

🔥 Topic: Faith at Home🎙 Special Guest: Kyle Turner

Whether you’re a father, future father, mentor, or spiritual leader—this conversation matters.

🗓 Tuesday, May 26 
⏰ 7:30 PM
💻 Zoom: https://subspla.sh/scq849x

Join men from across the Detroit Metro District for a night of wisdom, brotherhood, and growth.

#FaithAtHome #MensRoundtable #StrongFamilies #DetroitMetroMen

🚨 NEW FOR MEN ACROSS DETROIT METRO 🚨

Introducing The Men’s Roundtable — a new monthly Zoom gathering where men come together to grow, learn, and connect.

🧱 Valuable conversation
🔥 Deeper conviction
🤝 Strengthened community

Hear from powerful voices across our district and experience true brotherhood, greater access to leadership, and unity across our churches.

📅 Monday, January 19
⏰ 7:30 PM
💻 Zoom: https://subspla.sh/73vhqqr
🎙 Special Guest: Tim Richmond

👉 Open to all men. Invite a brother. Take a seat at the table.

#MensRoundtable #DetroitMetroMen #Brotherhood #MenWhoLead

When God moves AND the BBQ hits just right. 👏🍖
Huge shoutout to Holy Smokes BBQ for blessing us with a feast during our Men’s Conference!
You could taste the love — and maybe a little Holy Ghost in the seasoning. 😄 
#HolySmokesBBQ #MensConference #FaithAndFellowship

🔥 What. A. Weekend. 🔥
Our Men’s Conference last weekend was unforgettable — powerful service, real breakthrough, and a mighty move of God. 🙌
The kids had a blast in their own dynamic service, and we capped it all off with laser tag and some of the best BBQ in the state thanks to Holy Smokes BBQ! 🍗🔥
Brotherhood, faith, and fun — that’s how we do it. 💪
#MensConference #FaithInAction #HolySmokesBBQ #Brotherhood #ChurchFamily #PowerfulWeekend #detroitmetrodistrictupci #detrometromensministry
